# CWE-1173 positive: manual validation bypasses framework (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-1173-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

// CWE-1173: Improper Use of Validation Framework.
// Vulnerable: signup handler unmarshals into map and ignores struct validation tags.

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
	"sync"
)

type SignupPayloadPure struct {
	Email    string `json:"email" validate:"required,email"`
	Password string `json:"password" validate:"required,min=12"`
}

var customersMu sync.Mutex
var customersPure = map[string]string{}

func SignupManualPure() http.HandlerFunc {
	return func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		var raw map[string]interface{}
		if err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&raw); err != nil {
			http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusBadRequest)
			return
		}
		email, _ := raw["email"].(string)
		password, _ := raw["password"].(string)
		customersMu.Lock()
		customersPure[email] = password
		customersMu.Unlock()
		w.WriteHeader(http.StatusCreated)
		_ = SignupPayloadPure{}
	}
}
